metadata.description: Paul's custom Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: paul-os
plugins.description: Harness engineering plugin for systematic product development with AI agent teams. 15 specialized agents and 24 commands with --standalone mode, pipeline presets, autoplan decision principles, learnings system, scope lock debugging, proactive keyword routing, skill orchestration layer with dynamic skill nudge router (all 15 agents declare Owned Skills + Phase Mandatory Skills, router parses persona-index.yaml at runtime with zero hardcoded branches, borrow/subagent/reentry modes, persona routing, workflow hijacking protection, informational filter gating), quality benchmark harness (32 deterministic scenarios with golden snapshots, GitHub Actions CI, auto-generated dashboard), and Layer B agent behavior benchmarks (LLM-judge, 10 scenarios across pm/tech-lead/designer with 3-sample averaging and variance-based stability annotation).

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: KJH_ARCHIVE 통합 생산성 플러그인 — /아침·/저녁 워크플로우, 스프린트 관리(/스프린트·/스프린트-시작·/스프린트-종료), 재무·건강 에이전트, Gmail 연동, 세컨드브레인 자동화, 루틴 기반 타임블록(출근일/재택일)
